title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXIII. Riddles.
content:
[Ann.]

        There was a girl in our towne,
        Silk an' satin was her gowne,
        Silk an' satin, gold an' velvet,
        Guess her name, three times I've tell'd it.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXIII. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
